description: You are logged into OpenProject at http://localhost:8080 as admin (password: Admin1234!). In the E-Commerce Platform project, add a comment to the 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' work package with the text: 'Reproduced the issue on Safari 15.x and 16.x. Root cause identified: the payment form uses a non-standard form submission that Safari blocks. Fix involves switching to Fetch API-based submission. ETA: 2 days.' Ensure the comment appears in the work package activity feed.
